name: UNLV outlines plan for downtown Las Vegas hub at Civic Plaza campus
summary: UNLV leaders presented an update Wednesday to the Las Vegas City Council on UNLV @ Civic Plaza, a proposed downtown satellite campus at the city’s Civic Center and Plaza.

name: Attorney breaks down responsible artificial intelligence practices in legal guidance
summary: Law school students in Las Vegas will soon be schooled on AI. Beginning in the fall, the William S. Boyd School of Law at UNLV will require a new course on the rise of artificial intelligence. School officials say it's designed to prepare law students for one of the biggest shifts currently reshaping the legal profession.

name: Fury as consumers learn Uber and Lyft charge different prices for the same rides and offer deceptive discounts
summary: An analysis by researchers at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas, found that 12 percent of Uber rides and 21 percent of Lyft rides displayed discounts - a significant increase from levels recorded just two years earlier.

name: ‘A neoliberal nightmare’: my ride on the Vegas Loop – Elon Musk’s answer to traffic jams
summary: Ten years ago, after complaining that traffic was ‘driving him nuts’, Musk’s Boring Company began building underground tunnels to ease congestion on the roads. Did he overpromise and underdeliver?

name: I'm scared of flying — I asked a pilot the questions all nervous flyers need answers to
summary: Aviophobia, or fear of flying, is remarkably widespread and, for those of us who suffer from it, likely stems from the same fundamental issue — our brains struggling to cope with an environment where we feel utterly powerless.

name: Could the UK's social media ban for kids happen in the US? Nevada experts weigh in
summary: A proposed social media ban for children under 16 in the United Kingdom is reigniting conversations about how to protect young people online — and whether similar measures could eventually gain traction in the United States. The proposal would block children from accessing platforms including Instagram, Facebook, TikTok and YouTube.

name: Regents set to vote on new Boring Company tunnel station at UNLV
summary: Months after shelving the idea over parking concerns, UNLV is back on track to host a Vegas Loop station, with the Board of Regents set to decide next week whether to approve a deal with the Boring Company.

name: U.S. News & World ranks UNLV strongly in multiple categories
summary: UNLV appears several times on U.S. News & World’s Report’s new Best Global Universities rankings.

name: TikTok Shoppers Thought They Were Bidding on iPhones. Instead, They Won Teddy Bears
summary: Sellers on TikTok used pricey items to lure bidders to “Surprise Sets” livestreams, but most of the auctions yielded only cheap prizes. Gambling experts are concerned about the potential for harm.
